2606.30182.title: MirrorCode: AI can rebuild entire programs from behavior alone
2606.30182.paper_summary: AI models are rapidly improving at autonomous coding, as shown by benchmark progress and one-off demonstrations such as AI implementing a C compiler. However, existing coding benchmarks tend to focus on shorter tasks, and one-off demonstrations are hard to compare systematically because they often have some human guidance, and are not standardized or repeated across models. To address these challenges, we introduce MirrorCode, a long-horizon coding benchmark based on reimplementing entire software projects. In MirrorCode, AI agents must replicate the functionalities of an existing program, without access to its source code. AI solutions must match the original program's output exactly on end-to-end tests, including held-out tests. MirrorCode's 25 target programs span different areas of computing: Unix utilities, data serialization and query tools, bioinformatics, interpreters, static analysis, cryptography, and compression. Existing AI models can already reimplement complex software, with the strongest model scoring 56% across the benchmark. For example, AI can reimplement gotree, a 16,000-line bioinformatics toolkit - a task that we believe would take weeks for a human engineer. However, studying the frontier of performance requires a larger inference budget than typical benchmarks, for example, \$2,600 over 19 days for a single attempt on a large task. We show that AI agents can already complete long-horizon software engineering tasks, especially when requirements are precisely specified. More broadly, our work suggests AI will have transformative effects on software engineering, as autonomous agents continue to improve.
2606.30182.paper_summary_zh: AI 模型在自主編碼方面迅速進步，這一點從基準進展和一次性示範（例如 AI 實現 C 編譯器）中可以看出。然而，現有的編碼基準往往集中於較短的任務，而一次性示範因為通常有一些人類指導，且在模型之間未標準化或重複，因此難以系統性比較。為了解決這些挑戰，我們介紹了 MirrorCode，一個基於重新實現整個軟體專案的長期編碼基準。在 MirrorCode 中，AI 代理必須在無法訪問源代碼的情況下複製現有程式的功能。AI 解決方案必須在端到端測試中完全匹配原始程式的輸出，包括保留測試。MirrorCode 的 25 個目標程式涵蓋了計算的不同領域：Unix 工具、數據序列化和查詢工具、生物資訊學、解釋器、靜態分析、密碼學和壓縮。現有的 AI 模型已經可以重新實現複雜的軟體，最強的模型在基準測試中得分為 56%。例如，AI 可以重新實現 gotree，一個 16,000 行的生物資訊學工具包——我們認為這項任務對於人類工程師來說需要數週的時間。然而，研究性能的前沿需要比典型基準更大的推理預算，例如，在一個大型任務上進行單次嘗試需要 \$2,600，持續 19 天。我們顯示 AI 代理已經能夠完成長期的軟體工程任務，特別是當需求被精確指定時。更廣泛地說，我們的工作表明，隨著自主代理的持續改進，AI 將對軟體工程產生變革性的影響。
2606.30182.author: Tom Adamczewski et.al.
2606.30182.authors: Tom Adamczewski, David Owen, David Rein, Florian Brand, Giles Edkins, Allen Hart, Daniel O'Connell
